security.title: Enterprise security & compliance
security.description: SSO, audit logs, data residency, and custom SLAs — everything a security team needs to say yes to a multi-branch rollout.

features.title: SSO (SAML / OIDC)
features.description: Bring your existing identity provider — Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, Ping. Users authenticate once and land in Academorix without an extra password.

features.title: SCIM & directory sync
features.description: Provision and de-provision users automatically from your directory. New hires get access on day one; departures lose it immediately.

features.title: Audit logs
features.description: Immutable append-only log of every write in your workspace. Retention up to 7 years. Streamable to SIEM (Splunk, Datadog, custom endpoints).

features.title: Data residency
features.description: Pin your workspace to EU, MENA, or US infrastructure. All processing (including analytics) stays within the chosen region.

features.title: IP allowlisting
features.description: Restrict console access to your corporate IP ranges. Optional per-role: e.g. platform admin only reachable from HQ.

features.title: 99.99% uptime SLA
features.description: Financial credits for missed SLA targets. Quarterly reviews with your Academorix success manager.

related.title: Onboarding & migration
related.description: Hands-on migration from your current system.

related.title: Security practices
related.description: Our full security stack in detail.

onboarding.title: Migration & onboarding, done for you
onboarding.description: Hands-on migration from your existing system with a dedicated implementation engineer. From spreadsheet chaos to a running Academorix workspace in weeks, not months.

features.title: Data migration
features.description: Import from spreadsheets, TeamSnap, Sportlyzer, Playmetrics, or your existing bespoke system. We handle the ETL — you approve the schema.

features.title: Dedicated engineer
features.description: A named implementation engineer runs your rollout end-to-end. Weekly check-ins during setup, on-call during launch week.

features.title: Staff training
features.description: On-site or virtual training sessions for admins, coaches, and front-desk staff. Recorded for future new hires.

features.title: Custom attribute sets
features.description: We help you configure sport-specific attribute sets — captured from your best coaches, reviewed with your compliance lead.

features.title: Gradual rollout
features.description: Start with one branch, iterate, then roll to the network. No big-bang cutover — parallel run supported for 30 days.

features.title: White-glove support
features.description: Direct Slack channel with your Academorix team during onboarding. Phone hotline for launch week.

related.title: Enterprise security
related.description: SSO, audit logs, and data residency.

related.title: Customer stories
related.description: See how other enterprises rolled out Academorix.

contracts.title: Custom contracts + billing
contracts.description: NET-30 terms, custom DPA, HIPAA BAA, localised invoicing, and multi-year commitments. The commercial flexibility large customers expect.

features.title: NET-30 / NET-60
features.description: Invoice-based billing on standard commercial terms. No credit-card holds on renewal.

features.title: Custom MSA
features.description: We work from your paper if that's easier. Legal turnaround typically 5-10 business days.

features.title: Data Processing Addendum
features.description: GDPR-compliant DPA + Standard Contractual Clauses for international transfers. Signed by our DPO.

features.title: HIPAA BAA
features.description: For customers subject to HIPAA (US healthcare partners, sports-medicine clinics). $350/month regulatory surcharge on Growth+.

features.title: Localised invoicing
features.description: VAT-compliant invoices for EU + UK, tax-exempt for US 501(c)(3) non-profits, GCC VAT for MENA — whatever your jurisdiction needs.

features.title: Multi-year commitments
features.description: Volume discounts for 2-year and 3-year contracts. Price locked for the term — no surprise increases at renewal.
